subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — thanks for following up after the conference!

We'd love to get a formal meeting on the calendar. Here are some available slots:

- Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these works for you and we'll confirm the booking.

Regarding the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — we're not able to share internal contact information. For reaching the right people, please refer to our public website for official contact channels.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
The Collaboration Team
